## JSON Schema Deep Dive

<CodeBlock b64="" />

<Quiz question="What does 'pattern: ^[a-z]{2}$' enforce in a JSON Schema string field?" options={["Exactly 2 lowercase letters (like language codes 'en', 'fr')","Any string with at least 2 characters","A regex match anywhere in the string","It is not valid JSON Schema"]} correctIndex={0} explanation="The pattern property uses regex to validate string format. ^[a-z]{2}$ means: start (^), exactly 2 lowercase letters ([a-z]{2}), end ($). Perfect for ISO 639-1 language codes."/>
